notes: PARTS label consistency (redesign-only, legacy byte-identical) — nuke the stale 'HW REF' wording on the PARTS surface. Fixed both: (1) the ref-sub stab '<...>HW Ref</...>' → 'Parts' (title case, matches the Optics/Platforms/Know stabs); (2) REF_CAT_NAMES['rf-hwref'] 'HW REF' → 'PARTS' (the drill-in back-title; matches the OPTICS/PLATFORMS/KNOW casing). The card name (PARTS) + meta (Cables · Part numbers) were already correct; the routing key rf-hwref + showRefTab('rf-hwref') + data-rf are UNCHANGED (labels only). Left untouched (correctly): the legacy NOW-tile 'HW Ref' (#11482, legacy chrome), all code comments, and the redesign_homeHWRef function name (internal). Both edits are in pg-ref (redesign chrome, not rendered under legacy) → ?legacy=1 byte-identical; no CSS/logic change (braces unchanged). Design Law: names say what the door opens.
